texto: I think of myself as a Hollywood hillbilly, but I'm sick of all these questions people ask about Alabama. 'Do you have an outhouse?' 'Is there a lot of inbreeding in your family?' They think all Southerners don't have computers and TV sets and that we're all still living in 1862.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sunny Mabrey que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I think of myself as a Hollywood hillbilly, but I'm sick of all these questions people ask about …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, family, myself, com foco em myself e people.

frase_original: I think of myself as a Hollywood hillbilly, but I'm sick of all these questions people ask about Alabama. 'Do you have an outhouse?' 'Is there a lot of inbreeding in your family?' They think all Southerners don't have computers and TV sets and that we're all still living in 1862.
